title: NiceVanilla
description: Tired of modpacks stuffed with things you don’t understand? NiceVanilla is here to be your new best friend in Minecraft!
body:
NiceVannilla

Type: Lightweight Vanilla+ 

Modloader: Fabric 

Supported Minecraft Versions: 1.21.3 – 1.21.8 

Audience: Builders, streamers, casual players, vanilla purists

📌 Description
NiceVannilla is a lightweight modpack that preserves the spirit of vanilla Minecraft while adding just the right amount of quality-of-life improvements, visual enhancements, and building tools. No overhauls, no game-breaking changes — just a smoother, prettier, and more functional experience. Perfect for servers, content creation, or relaxed solo survival.

🧩 Core Mods
AppleSkin – Displays accurate food and saturation values

Chat Heads – Adds player avatars to chat messages

Entity Culling – Improves performance by hiding unseen entities

Fabric API – Core library for mod functionality

Iris Shaders + Sodium – Shader support with high FPS

JourneyMap – Minimap with waypoints and world view

Litematica + Printer – Advanced schematic building tools

MaLiLib – Required library for Litematica

Mod Menu – Easy mod management interface

My Terra Doll – Decorative or functional item

ReplayMod – Record and replay gameplay sessions

Simple Voice Chat – In-game voice communication

Sodium Extra – Extended graphics settings

Text Placeholder API – Template support for custom text

Solas Shader – Atmospheric lighting and visuals

⚙️ Features
Smooth performance on mid-range PCs

Shader support without FPS loss

Built-in voice chat for multiplayer

Precision building tools for creative projects

Replay recording for content creators

Fully compatible with vanilla mechanics.




!Please do not update sodium at version 1.21.3. because unfortunately if you update sodium at 
version 1.21.3 the game will crash.
